caption:
The U.S. government has permitted Anthropic to introduce its powerful AI model, Mythos, to select trusted organizations across the country. This move marks a significant step in AI deployment for government-approved companies. 

What's your take on the implications of this release? 

Sources: Semafor

story.title: U.S. allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI to ‘trusted’ US organizations
